# Time math: timestamp_diff, current_time, format_timestamp

Verified time helpers on real telemetry: `timestamp_diff(current_time(), _time, "SECOND")` returns the age of an event in seconds (units: SECOND/MINUTE/HOUR/DAY); `current_time()` is the now-anchor. `format_timestamp("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", _time)` renders the epoch-millis `_time` as a human-readable string for reports. `comp earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by <entity>` gives the activity span per entity. Pair with `bin _time span = 5m` (a standalone stage) for time-bucketed rates.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| alter age_s = timestamp_diff(current_time(), _time, "SECOND"), when = format_timestamp("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", _time)
| fields when, age_s, actor_process_image_name, actor_process_command_line
| sort asc age_s
```

_Stage/function syntax live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (Advanced-auth PAPI, narrow window). The mechanics are confirmed; adapt field names to your dataset._
